title: Vilayaattaa Padagotty Lyrics Dhoni Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Vilayaattaa Padagotty vizhayaadum paruvam poi
Nijamaana odam pol naam aanom (2)

Karaikaana kadal melae neeyum naanum
Thadumaarum odam pol thaavip paarthom
Ennaannaalum aerpadhudhaan vazhkaiyamma (Vilayaattaa ..)

Thathi thathi neeril aadi
suthi suthi suzhalum podhu
Akkaraiku pogathaane allaadum

Ethanayo puyalum kandu
kottu mazhayil porumaiyum kondu
Tholai dhooram serathaana thalaadum

Thannooda vazhiyellam
thannathavira thunaiyundo
Thesaiellaam vazhiyaagum
oru vazhi thaan unnakaagum
eppodhu karaya serum odam..odam. (Vilayaattaa ..)

Vettu patta kaayam thaangi
kattu mara vadivam kondu
Kaatai vittu kadalil vandhu karaithaedum

Pattapagal veyilil kaaindhu
natta nadu nilavil thoindhu
vetta veli vaanam paarthu vizhayaadum

Kadalilthaan thirindhaalum
aalangal ariyaadhu
Kadal serum nadhiyellaam
thirumbithaan pogaadhu
Mudivillah mudivikedhu mudivu.mudivu.(Vilayaattaa ..)

Karaikaana kadal melae neeyum naanum
Thadumaarum odam pol thaavip paarthom
Ennaannaalum aerpadhudhaan vazhkaiyamma (Vilayaattaa ..)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vilayaattaa Padagotty'?

The song conveys themes of love and nostalgia, reflecting on the beauty of relationships and life's fleeting moments.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Dhoni'?

The movie revolves around the life of a young man and his aspirations, with the song highlighting his emotional journey.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Shreya Ghoshal and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Vilayaattaa Padagotty' released?

The song was released on February 5, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vilayaattaa Padagotty, the protagonist reflects on love and the passage of time, beautifully encapsulated through the soothing vocals of Shreya Ghoshal. The song serves as a poignant reminder of cherished memories and emotional connections. Set against the backdrop of the movie Dhoni, it enhances the narrative of longing and romance. The melodic composition by Ilaiyaraaja further elevates the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vilayaattaa Padagotty from Dhoni is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voice of Shreya Ghoshal and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song transports listeners to a world of nostalgia and emotion. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates deeply with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: In the playful season of life, we are like a true flowing stream.
You and I are like waves on the restless sea, looking at the horizon. No matter what, life is always about moving forward.
When the water dances and swirls, it doesn't just flow to the shore.
In the storm, we find patience in the rain, and the distance we leave behind becomes a path ahead.
Is there any true support other than one's own path? All nations will find a way, and that way is always for you, flowing like a river.
With the burden of a fallen tree, we create a new form and come to the sea to find our way.
In the bright sunlight, we find our place in the world, looking at the vast sky.
Even if we dive into the sea, the waves do not recognize us. The sea and river will always flow back, never ending, never finishing.
You and I are like waves on the restless sea, looking at the horizon. No matter what, life is always about moving forward.
